name: codex-sandbox
description: Standalone Codex-derived sandbox host, Node adapter, and test CLI

scripts.build:packages: pnpm --dir packages/codex-sandbox-adapter build && pnpm --dir packages/codex-sandbox-cli build && pnpm --dir examples/minimal-ts build
scripts.build: pnpm run build:native && pnpm run sync:native && pnpm run build:packages
scripts.check: pnpm --dir packages/codex-sandbox-adapter build && pnpm --dir packages/codex-sandbox-cli check && pnpm --dir examples/minimal-ts check
